basics.name: Venkata Naresh Boddepalli
basics.label: Plant Breeder | Legume Specialist | Genomics, Phenomics & AI-Assisted Breeding
basics.summary: Results-driven plant breeder with ~12 years of experience in legume crop improvement, integrating classical breeding with GWAS, genomic prediction, and AI-assisted high-throughput phenotyping.

location.address: Department of Agronomy, Iowa State University

work.name: Iowa State University - Dept. of Agronomy
work.summary: Integrating image-based phenomics with genomic data for quantitative trait mapping in mungbean.
highlights: Improved hybridization success from 25% to 65%, shortening breeding timelines by 1-2 years.
Designed AI-enabled pod and seed imaging systems, reducing manual scoring time by 60%.
Conducted GWAS and genomic prediction on 372 mungbean genotypes using ~30K SNPs.
FAA-licensed drone pilot supporting field-scale imaging and spatial data analysis.

work.name: World Vegetable Center (AVRDC), ICRISAT Campus
work.position: Scientific Officer - Legume Breeding & Seed Production
work.summary: Managed full breeding and seed production pipeline for 5 legume crops across South and Central Asia.
highlights: Led and managed a team of 10 staff across multiple concurrent breeding projects.
Co-authored grant proposals securing ~USD 1 million from ACIAR and ~USD 480K from RKVY.
Trained 50+ researchers from 10 countries in mungbean breeding and KDDart database management.

education.summary: Dissertation: Genomics and AI-Assisted Phenomics for Mungbean Crop Improvement

education.institution: Chandra Shekhar Azad University of Agriculture & Technology
education.summary: Thesis: Heterosis and Combining Ability for Quantitative Traits and Cercospora Leaf Spot Resistance in Brinjal

awards.title: NAPB Borlaug Scholar
awards.summary: Recognized for outstanding potential in plant breeding.

awards.title: Mungbean Messenger
awards.summary: Recognized for outstanding contributions to legume breeding in South Asia.

projects.name: DARPA Bio-shield
projects.summary: Research Assistant focusing on sustainable cyber-agricultural systems.
